storyBeat: 老爺爺救受傷的鶴 — 鶴會回來嗎?

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Tonight's story has a few new words. Let's learn them first!
questions.sentenceZh: 今晚的故事會用到幾個新字，我們先把它們學會！
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶說：今晚要講鶴的報恩，先來認識幾個關鍵字，記住了故事更好聽喔！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
這四個字都在鶴的報恩故事裡：
🔑 crane = 鶴
🔑 snow = 雪
🔑 old man = 老人
🔑 trap = 陷阱
背熟這 4 個字，故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Four more words — can you match them all?
questions.explanationZh:
再來四個：
🔑 kind = 善良
🔑 wing = 翅膀
🔑 hurt = 受傷
🔑 free = 自由

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Which one is a crane?
questions.question: Which one is a crane?
questions.explanationZh: crane = 鶴 🕊️！故事裡一隻白鶴被陷阱困住了，老人把牠救了出來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Which one shows snow?
questions.question: Which one shows snow?
questions.explanationZh: snow = 雪 ❄️！故事發生在寒冷的冬天，到處都是白白的雪。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A kind old man helped a hurt bird.
questions.sentenceZh: 一個善良的老人幫助了受傷的鳥。
questions.question: Which picture matches the sentence?
options: a boy chasing birds in a field
an old man walking past a river
a kind old man freeing a hurt bird
a girl feeding ducks by a pond
optionsZh: 善良的老人放走受傷的鳥
一個女孩在池邊餵鴨子
questions.explanationZh: kind old man + hurt bird = 善良的老人幫助受傷的鳥——圖中正好是老人輕輕放走受傷的鳥。

storyBeat: 美麗女孩來敲門 — 她是誰?

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: A few more words to learn — then the story begins!
questions.sentenceZh: 再記幾個字，故事就要開始了！
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶說：再學幾個重要的字，學會了，故事就更好懂囉！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese phrase to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
這四個片語都出現在鶴的報恩故事裡：
🔑 white feather = 白色羽毛
🔑 weave cloth = 織布
🔑 soft knock = 輕輕敲門
🔑 made a promise = 答應了

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The young woman sat at the loom to weave cloth all night.
questions.sentenceZh: 年輕女孩整晚坐在織布機前織布。
questions.question: Which picture matches 'weave cloth'?
options: a girl cooking soup over a fire
an old man reading by a candle
a young woman weaving at a loom
a child playing in the snow outside
optionsZh: 一個老人在蠟燭旁讀書
一個年輕女子在織布機旁織布
questions.explanationZh: weave cloth = 織布。故事裡女孩整晚在織布機旁織出美麗的布。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Which one is a feather?
questions.question: Which one is a feather?
questions.explanationZh: feather = 羽毛 🪶！故事裡的鶴用自己的白色羽毛織出了美麗的布。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old man ___ a kind old man alone in the mountains.
questions.sentenceEasy: The old man ___ a kind old man alone.
questions.sentenceHard: Long ago, the old man ___ a kind old man who lived alone in the snowy mountains.
questions.question: Which word is correct?
questions.explanationZh:
故事發生在很久以前，所以要用過去式。主詞是「the old man」（一個人），過去式用 was，不是 were。
完整句：The old man was a kind old man alone in the mountains.

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Let's review all the new words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
把這節的重點字再複習一遍：
🔑 feather = 羽毛
🔑 cloth = 布
🔑 promise = 答應
🔑 kind = 善良

storyBeat: 女孩織出珍貴的布 — 為什麼她要躲起來織?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 weave = 織
🔑 cloth = 布
🔑 room = 房間
🔑 promise = 答應
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The next morning, the young woman did not leave.
questions.explanationZh: 第二天早上,女孩沒有離開。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She cooked the meals. She cleaned the house.
questions.question: How did she help the old man?
questions.explanationZh: 她煮飯、打掃——這些都是家事,選「做家事」。
questions.sentenceZh: 她煮飯，她打掃，把家裡照顧得好好的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She called the old man "Grandfather" with a soft voice.
questions.explanationZh: 她用輕輕的聲音叫老人「爺爺」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They lived together like a real family every day.
questions.questionEn: Did the old man feel alone now?
questions.explanationZh: 他們像一家人一樣生活——有人陪了,不孤單了,答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 他們每天一起生活，就像真正的一家人。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Grandfather, I want to weave a cloth for you."
questions.explanationZh: 「爺爺,我想為你織一塊布。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What rule did she give the old man?
questions.question: What rule did she give?
questions.explanationZh: never look → 不要看房間裡面。
questions.sentenceZh: 她交代老人什麼規矩？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "I promise. I will not look," said the old man.
questions.explanationZh: 「我答應。我不會看,」老人說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The wooden loom began to click and clack all night.
questions.question: What sound came from the back room?
questions.explanationZh: wooden loom + click clack = 木製織布機的喀喀聲——就是木頭的喀喀聲。
questions.sentenceZh: 木頭織布機整個夜晚喀噠喀噠地響個不停。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old man sat by the door. He listened all night.
questions.explanationZh: 老人坐在門邊。他聽了整晚。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She cooked the meals. She cleaned the house.
questions.question: What did the young woman do to help?
questions.explanationZh: 煮飯 + 打掃 → 每天煮飯打掃。
questions.sentenceZh: 她煮飯，她打掃，把家裡照顧得好好的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They lived together like a real family every day.
questions.explanationZh: 他們像真正的一家人一起生活——是的,答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 他們每天一起生活，就像真正的一家人。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "I promise. I will not look," said the old man.
questions.question: What did the old man agree to do?
questions.explanationZh: he said I will not look = 他說他不會看——他答應不看房間裡面。
questions.sentenceZh: 「我答應，我不會看，」老人說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each phrase with its meaning.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 weave a cloth = 織一塊布
🔑 never look = 絕不偷看
🔑 I promise = 我答應
🔑 click and clack = 喀喀作響

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The wooden loom began to click and clack all night.
questions.question: When did the young woman weave?
questions.explanationZh: click and clack all night = 整夜喀喀聲——她整夜在織。
questions.sentenceZh: 木頭織布機整個夜晚喀噠喀噠地響個不停。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Grandfather, I want to weave a cloth for you."
questions.questionEn: Was the cloth for the old man?
questions.explanationZh: 她說「為你織」——布是要給老人的,答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 「爺爺，我想為你織一塊布。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She gave the old man one rule: never look inside the room while she weaves.
questions.question: Why did she give the old man a rule?
questions.explanationZh: 不能看她織——她想保持織布時的秘密。
questions.sentenceZh: 她給老人一個規矩：她在織布時絕對不能看進房間裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old man sat by the door. He listened all night.
questions.question: How did the old man feel waiting outside?
questions.explanationZh: 坐在門邊、聽了整晚——他好奇但耐心地等。
questions.sentenceZh: 老人坐在門邊，聽了整整一個夜晚。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Why must she hide while she weaves? Why never look?...
questions.explanationZh: 為什麼她織布時要躲起來?為什麼不能看?……

storyBeat: 商人來看布讚不絕口 — 老爺爺好奇了

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 three days = 三天
🔑 market = 市場
🔑 merchant = 商人
🔑 gold = 黃金
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: After three days, the young woman came out of the room.
questions.explanationZh: 三天後,女孩走出房間。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She held a soft white cloth. It shone like fresh snow.
questions.question: How did the cloth look?
questions.explanationZh: 布閃著光,像新鮮的雪——亮又漂亮,選「亮又漂亮」。
questions.sentenceZh: 她捧出一匹柔軟的白布，像剛落的雪一樣閃著光。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old man took the cloth to the village market.
questions.explanationZh: 老人把布拿到村子的市場。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A merchant saw the cloth and gasped at it.
questions.questionEn: Did the merchant like the cloth?
questions.explanationZh: 商人倒抽一口氣——那是驚艷到了!他很喜歡那塊布,答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 一個商人看見那匹布，驚得倒吸一口氣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "This is the finest cloth I have ever seen!"
questions.explanationZh: 「這是我看過最棒的布!」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did the merchant pay?
questions.question: What did he pay?
questions.explanationZh: big bag of gold = 一大袋金子。
questions.sentenceZh: 商人付了多少錢？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old man went home with the heavy bag of gold.
questions.explanationZh: 老人帶著重重的金子袋回家。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But his heart kept asking, "Who is she really?"
questions.question: How did the old man feel inside?
questions.explanationZh: 心裡一直問「她到底是誰?」——老人好奇又不確定,選「好奇又不確定」。
questions.sentenceZh: 可是他的心一直問著：「她到底是什麼人？」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: At night, the small back door stayed closed and quiet.
questions.explanationZh: 晚上,小後門安安靜靜的關著。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She held a soft white cloth. It shone like fresh snow.
questions.question: How did the cloth look?
questions.explanationZh: shone like fresh snow = 像新雪一樣閃亮——閃亮、白色、柔軟。
questions.sentenceZh: 她捧出一匹柔軟的白布，像剛落的雪一樣閃著光。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "This is the finest cloth I have ever seen!"
questions.questionEn: Had the merchant seen cloth this good before?
questions.explanationZh: 「我看過最棒的」= 從來沒看過這麼好的——答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 「這是我看過最棒的布！」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old man went home with the heavy bag of gold.
questions.question: What did the old man earn from the cloth?
questions.explanationZh: went home with a heavy bag of gold = 帶著一袋重重的金子回家。
questions.sentenceZh: 老人帶著沉甸甸的金子袋回家。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each phrase with its meaning.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 finest cloth = 最棒的布
🔑 village market = 村子市場
🔑 bag of gold = 一袋金子
🔑 kept asking = 不停問

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But his heart kept asking, "Who is she really?"
questions.question: What question could the old man not stop thinking about?
options: what food he should cook next
how much gold he had now
who the young woman truly was
questions.explanationZh: heart kept asking 'who is she really?' → 老人一直在想女孩到底是誰。
questions.sentenceZh: 但他的心一直問著：「她到底是什麼人？」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A merchant saw the cloth and gasped at it.
questions.questionEn: Was the merchant surprised by the cloth?
questions.explanationZh: gasped = 倒抽一口氣——這是驚訝的反應,答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 一個商人看見那匹布，驚得倒吸一口氣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: At night, the small back door stayed closed and quiet.
questions.question: What was the old man still wondering about?
options: the secret behind the closed door
the best way to count gold
what the merchant said to others
questions.explanationZh: 門一直關著、他心裡不停問——他還在想那扇門後的秘密。
questions.sentenceZh: 晚上，小後門安安靜靜的關著。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: After three days the young woman came out. The cloth she made shone like snow.
questions.question: How long did she weave before coming out?
questions.explanationZh: After three days = 三天後——她織了整整三天。
questions.sentenceZh: 三天後，年輕女子走出房間，她織的布像雪一樣閃亮。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "How can she weave such magic? Who is she really?..."
questions.explanationZh: 「她怎麼會織出這樣的奇蹟?她到底是誰?……」

questions.sentence: The old man took the cloth to the market.
questions.answer: The old man took the cloth to the market.
accept: The old man brought the cloth to the market.
He took the cloth to the market.
He brought the cloth to the market.
The old man took the cloth to sell at the market.
questions.explanationZh: took to the market = 拿到市場去。take → took（過去式），the cloth 是布，the market 是市場。
questions.sentenceZh: 老人把布拿到市場去賣。

questions.sentence: This is the finest cloth I have ever seen!
questions.answer: This is the finest cloth I have ever seen!
accept: This is the best cloth I have ever seen!
This is the most beautiful cloth I have ever seen!
This is the finest cloth I've ever seen!
This is the best cloth I've ever seen!
questions.explanationZh: finest = 最棒的（fine 的最高級）。I have ever seen = 我曾看過的——合在一起就是「我看過最棒的」。
questions.sentenceZh: 這是我看過最棒的布！

questions.sentence: The cloth she made shone like fresh snow.
questions.answer: The cloth she made shone like fresh snow.
accept: The cloth she wove shone like fresh snow.
Her cloth shone like fresh snow.
The cloth shone like fresh snow.
The cloth she made glowed like fresh snow.
questions.explanationZh: shone = 閃耀（shine 的過去式）。like fresh snow = 像新落的雪。這句描述白布的美麗，是故事裡的核心畫面。
questions.sentenceZh: 她織出的布閃耀得像剛落的雪。

questions.sentence: Every night the old man heard feathers brushing against wood. After three days the young woman came out, pale and thin, holding a cloth that glowed like moonlight.
questions.question: Why did the young woman look pale and thin after weaving?
options: She forgot to eat during the long winter nights.
She used her own body to make something precious.
The cold room made her feel unwell each time.
She worked too fast and hurt her hands on the loom.
optionsZh: 她在漫長的冬夜忘了吃東西。
她用自己的身體來創造珍貴的東西。
冰冷的房間讓她每次都不舒服。
她工作太快，雙手被織布機割傷了。
questions.explanationZh: 鶴的秘密：她用自己的白羽毛織進布裡，每織一塊就消耗自己的一部分——所以織完後都蒼白又消瘦。這是推論題，答案是「用自己的身體來創造珍貴的東西」。

storyBeat: 偷看的衝動越來越強 — 他會偷看嗎?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 second = 第二
🔑 rich = 富有
🔑 curiosity = 好奇心
🔑 peek = 偷看
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The young woman wove a second cloth, then a third.
questions.explanationZh: 女孩織了第二塊布,然後第三塊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Each cloth shone brighter than the one before.
questions.question: How were the new cloths?
questions.explanationZh: brighter than before = 比上一次還亮——每塊都一次比一次亮。
questions.sentenceZh: 每一匹布都比上一匹更加耀眼。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old man's house was full of bags of gold.
questions.explanationZh: 老人的家裡擺滿了一袋袋的金子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He had many bags of gold. But his heart felt heavy.
questions.questionEn: Was the gold enough to make him happy?
questions.explanationZh: 金子很多,但心裡沉甸甸的——金子不夠讓他快樂,答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 他有了許多金袋子，心裡卻越來越沉重。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Every night, he sat by the door of the back room.
questions.explanationZh: 每天晚上,他坐在後面房間的門邊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What strange sound did he hear?
questions.question: What sound did he hear?
questions.explanationZh: feathers brushing wood = 羽毛擦過木頭。
questions.sentenceZh: 他聽見了什麼奇怪的聲音？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His curiosity grew bigger and bigger every night.
questions.explanationZh: 他的好奇心一晚比一晚大。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Just one peek. She will never know," he thought.
questions.question: What was the old man telling himself?
options: A small look will be safe
She is just an ordinary girl
questions.explanationZh: 他心想「只看一下,她不會知道的」——這就是說服自己「看一下不會怎樣」。
questions.sentenceZh: 「就看一眼，她不會知道的。」他心想。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His hand moved slowly toward the door of the room.
questions.explanationZh: 他的手慢慢的伸向房間的門。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The young woman wove a second cloth, then a third.
questions.question: How many cloths did she weave in total?
questions.explanationZh: a second, then a third = 第二塊、然後第三塊——至少三塊。
questions.sentenceZh: 女孩織了第二塊布，然後第三塊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old man's house was full of bags of gold.
questions.questionEn: Did the old man become richer over time?
questions.explanationZh: 家裡放滿了金袋子——他越來越富有,答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 老人的家裡擺滿了一袋袋的金子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He had many bags of gold. But his heart felt heavy.
questions.question: Why did the old man feel heavy in his heart?
options: his bag was too hard to carry
questions.explanationZh: 有金子但心還是沉——因為他忍不住一直想那個秘密。
questions.sentenceZh: 他有了許多金袋子，心裡卻越來越沉重。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each phrase with its meaning.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 grew bigger = 越來越大
🔑 feathers brushing = 羽毛輕擦
🔑 just one peek = 只偷看一下
🔑 hand moved slowly = 手慢慢移動

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Just one peek. She will never know," he thought.
questions.question: What was the old man trying to tell himself?
questions.explanationZh: just one peek + she will never know = 說服自己偷看一眼沒事。
questions.sentenceZh: 「就看一眼，她不會知道的。」他心想。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His curiosity grew bigger and bigger every night.
questions.questionEn: Was it getting harder for him to keep his promise?
questions.explanationZh: 好奇心一晚比一晚大——當然越來越難守承諾,答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 他的好奇心一晚比一晚大。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His hand moved slowly toward the door of the room.
questions.question: What was the old man about to do?
questions.explanationZh: 手慢慢伸向門——他要打破承諾去偷看了。
questions.sentenceZh: 他的手慢慢地伸向房間的門。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Every night he sat by the door. He heard feathers brushing wood.
questions.question: What strange sound did the old man hear each night?
questions.explanationZh: feathers brushing wood = 羽毛碰木頭——每晚都聽到這個奇怪的聲音。
questions.sentenceZh: 每天晚上他坐在後房的門邊，聽見羽毛擦過木頭的聲音。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Just one small peek," he thinks. "She will never know..."
questions.explanationZh: 「只看一下下,」他想。「她不會知道……」

storyBeat: 看到鶴在拔自己的羽毛織布 — 她會留下嗎?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 midnight = 半夜
🔑 tiptoe = 踮腳
🔑 feather = 羽毛
🔑 eyes meet = 對到眼
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One cold midnight, the old man could not wait.
questions.explanationZh: 一個寒冷的半夜,老人忍不住了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He tiptoed very softly to the door of the small room.
questions.questionEn: Was the old man being quiet on purpose?
questions.explanationZh: 踮著腳、輕輕走——他故意不發出聲音,答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 他踮起腳，輕輕地走到那扇小房間的門前。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He slid the door open, just a little bit.
questions.explanationZh: 他把門推開,只一點點。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: There was no young woman. There was a white crane.
questions.question: Who was at the loom?
questions.explanationZh: 裡面沒有女孩,有一隻白鶴——white crane = 白色的大鳥,選「一隻高高的白色大鳥」。
questions.sentenceZh: 裡面沒有年輕女子，只有一隻白鶴。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She was pulling her own feathers, one by one.
questions.explanationZh: 她正在一根一根的拔自己的羽毛。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did the crane do with her feathers?
questions.question: What did she do with them?
questions.explanationZh: wove them into the cloth = 織進布裡。
questions.sentenceZh: 白鶴用自己的羽毛做了什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her body was thin and bare. She looked very tired.
questions.explanationZh: 她的身體又瘦又光禿。她看起來很累。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old man's heart broke. He could not move.
questions.question: How did the old man feel?
questions.explanationZh: heart broke + 不能動——震驚到心都碎了,又非常難過。
questions.sentenceZh: 老人的心碎了，他站在那裡動也不動。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The crane turned her head. Their eyes met in silence.
questions.explanationZh: 鶴轉過頭。他們安靜的對到眼。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One cold midnight, the old man could not wait.
questions.question: Why did the old man go to the room at midnight?
options: he needed a glass of water
she called him to come in
questions.explanationZh: could not wait = 忍不住了——好奇心太強,再也等不住了。
questions.sentenceZh: 一個寒冷的半夜，老人再也忍不住了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: There was no young woman. There was a white crane.
questions.questionEn: Did the old man see the young woman inside?
questions.explanationZh: 裡面沒有女孩,只有一隻白鶴——答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 裡面沒有年輕女子，只有一隻白鶴。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She was pulling her own feathers, one by one.
questions.question: What was the crane doing to make the cloth?
questions.explanationZh: pulling her own feathers = 拔自己的羽毛——這就是她織布的方式。
questions.sentenceZh: 牠正在一根一根地拔自己的羽毛。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each phrase with its meaning.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 slid the door = 推開門
🔑 her own feathers = 她自己的羽毛
🔑 thin and bare = 又瘦又光
🔑 eyes met = 眼神對上

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her body was thin and bare. She looked very tired.
questions.question: What did the crane's body look like?
questions.explanationZh: thin and bare = 又瘦、羽毛都沒了——她拔光了自己的羽毛。
questions.sentenceZh: 牠的身體又瘦又光禿，看起來很累。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old man's heart broke. He could not move.
questions.questionEn: Was the old man shocked by what he saw?
questions.explanationZh: heart broke + 不能動——他太震驚了,答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 老人的心碎了，他站在那裡動也不動。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The crane turned her head. Their eyes met in silence.
questions.question: How did the moment feel when their eyes met?
questions.explanationZh: in silence = 沉默中——安靜、充滿感情的一刻。
questions.sentenceZh: 鶴轉過頭，他們在沉默中對到眼。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old man saw the crane pulling her feathers to weave. Her body was thin and tired.
questions.question: What was the big secret the old man discovered?
options: the room was full of gold
the young woman was the crane
questions.explanationZh: 看到鶴在拔自己羽毛織布,女孩不見了——秘密是女孩就是那隻鶴。
questions.sentenceZh: 老人看到白鶴一根根拔自己的羽毛在織布，牠的身體又瘦又累。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Their eyes meet in silence. Will she still stay?...
questions.explanationZh: 他們安靜的對到眼。她還會留下嗎?……

storyBeat: 鶴飛走的天空 — 學到什麼?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 tear = 眼淚
🔑 bow = 鞠躬
🔑 wing = 翅膀
🔑 sky = 天空
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The next morning, the young woman stood at the door.
questions.explanationZh: 第二天早上,女孩站在門口。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Tears shone quietly in her soft, dark eyes.
questions.question: How did the young woman look?
questions.explanationZh: 眼睛閃著眼淚,輕輕的——難過流淚,選「難過流淚」。
questions.sentenceZh: 淚水在她柔軟的黑眼睛裡靜靜閃著光。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "I was the crane you saved in the snow," she said.
questions.explanationZh: 「我就是你在雪裡救的那隻鶴,」她說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "But now you have seen me. I cannot stay."
questions.questionEn: Will the young woman stay with him?
questions.explanationZh: 她說「你看到我了,我不能留下」——cannot stay = 不能留,答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 「可是你已經看見我了，我不能留下來了。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She bowed deeply. She walked slowly to the door.
questions.explanationZh: 她深深的鞠躬。她慢慢的走向門口。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What happened when she stepped outside?
questions.question: What happened outside?
options: 🐱 a cat ran past the door
questions.explanationZh: 走出去 → 變成白鶴 (magic transform A2 OK)。
questions.sentenceZh: 她走出門的時候發生了什麼事？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She spread her big white wings in the cold air.
questions.explanationZh: 她在冷空氣中展開大大的白翅膀。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She flew up, up, up into the morning sky.
questions.question: Where did the crane go?
questions.explanationZh: 她飛上去、越飛越高——就是飛上高高的天空,不是死喔。
questions.sentenceZh: 她振翅飛起，越飛越高，消失在清晨的天空中。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old man held the soft white cloth close to his heart.
questions.explanationZh: 老人把柔軟的白布緊緊抱在胸口。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Tears shone quietly in her soft, dark eyes.
questions.question: How did the young woman feel saying goodbye?
questions.explanationZh: tears shone = 眼淚閃著光——她難過、淚眼汪汪。
questions.sentenceZh: 淚水在她柔軟的黑眼睛裡靜靜閃著光。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "But now you have seen me. I cannot stay."
questions.questionEn: Could she stay because he had seen her secret?
questions.explanationZh: 她說「我不能留下」——她不能留,答 No (cannot stay = 不可以留)。
questions.sentenceZh: 「但你已經看見我了，我不能留下來了。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "I was the crane you saved in the snow," she said.
questions.question: Why did the young woman come to help the old man?
questions.explanationZh: 她是他救的鶴——她來是為了感謝他救了她。
questions.sentenceZh: 「我就是你在雪裡救的那隻鶴，」她說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each phrase with its meaning.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 tears shone = 淚水閃光
🔑 bowed deeply = 深深鞠躬
🔑 big white wings = 大大的白翅膀
🔑 held it close = 緊緊抱著

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She bowed deeply. She walked slowly to the door.
questions.question: What did she do before she left?
questions.explanationZh: bowed deeply = 深深鞠躬——她鞠躬道別再離開。
questions.sentenceZh: 她深深地鞠了個躬，然後慢慢走向門口。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old man held the soft white cloth close to his heart.
questions.questionEn: Did the old man keep the cloth as a memory?
questions.explanationZh: 把布緊緊抱在胸口——他把布留作紀念,答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 老人把柔軟的白布緊緊抱在胸口。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She flew up, up, up into the morning sky.
questions.question: Where did the crane go in the end?
options: back up into the open sky
questions.explanationZh: flew up, up, up = 一直往上飛——飛回到開闊的天空。
questions.sentenceZh: 她振翅飛起，越飛越高，消失在清晨的天空中。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A crane came to thank the old man. She worked hard for him. But she had to leave when he saw her secret.
questions.question: What is the main message of this story?
options: gold is the most important thing
optionsZh: 永遠不要相信陌生訪客
永遠打開每一扇鎖著的門
questions.explanationZh: 老人救了鶴，鶴來報恩——善意會被善意回報,這就是故事的核心。
questions.sentenceZh: 一隻鶴來報恩，為老人辛苦工作。但老人看到她的秘密後，她只能離開。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The sky is empty. But what did we learn from her?...
questions.explanationZh: 天空空了。但我們從她身上學到了什麼?……
